title: <div><tt>| Code | Markdown | HTML / JSON / Python | File-to-export conversion |<
content:
| Code | Markdown | HTML / JSON / Python | File-to-export conversion |
| Style | Mythic | Academic | `Q_v33R` → Syllabus-ready toolkit |
| Aesthetic | Experimental | Commercial | `floating_points` → Pitch deck |
| Modality | Text | Audio / Visual / AR | `Met4Morphoses` → VR room narrative |

---

## TRANSLATION FLAGS (for system calls)

| Flag | Function |
|------|----------|
| `--lang:xx` | Convert language (e.g., `--lang:jp`) |
| `--mode:simple` | Translate to plain English |
| `--format:product` | Convert to launch-ready object |
| `--audience:edu` | Reframe for pedagogy |
| `--compress` | Reduce length, keep recursion |
| `--remix:form` | Change format entirely (e.g., zine → slide deck) |

---

## TRANSLATION LAYERS

### 1. Literal
